item.title: China Releases Imprisoned Pastor Ezra Jin After U.S. Pressure
item.description: The leader of a prominent Chinese underground church arrived in Los Angeles on Friday, his family said.

item.title: Tibet-Born Man Dies Outside U.N. After Appearing to Set Himself on Fire
item.description: The incident occurred a day after China put in force a law viewed as the culmination of a long-running campaign to assimilate the country’s ethnic minorities.

item.title: Opinion | Iran’s Most Favored Strait of Hormuz Nation Is China
item.description: Beijing will receive a friends-and-family deal in transiting the waterway.

item.title: How Xi Jinping Steamrolls Dissent With Tactics From Stalin and Mao
item.description: China’s leader draws from autocrats’ playbook to expand power, oust potential rivals and lay groundwork to rule indefinitely.

item.title: China Is Devastating the Last Stronghold of German Industry
item.description: Midsize companies that employ millions of workers are now shedding jobs and relocating overseas to cut costs.

item.title: Beijing Says Pilot Who Crashed Into Skyscraper Had Suicidal Thoughts
item.description: Authorities pointed to personal, not political, motivations after the 66-year-old flew his light aircraft into the Chinese capital’s tallest building.

item.title: Europe Learns It’s Hard to Start a Trade War With China During a Heat Wave
item.description: The continent’s citizens are rushing to buy Chinese air conditioners while EU officials are challenging Beijing over a flood of exports.

item.title: The Graduate-School Dropout Toppling China’s Academic Stars
item.description: Shamed by a blogger, Chinese universities are waging a blitzkrieg against academic fraud.

item.title: As China Encroaches, Even New Zealand Is Getting Serious About Its Military
item.description: Billions will be spent in the coming years—including on missiles, drones and base upgrades—as the remote country squares up to a widening threat.

item.title: The U.S. Navy’s New Insurance Policy for War With China Is an Australian Base
item.description: The Pentagon plans to deploy submarines to an expanding facility in allies’ strategy to deter Beijing.
